home.offer_interviews_desc: In-depth conversations with stakeholders from across the border region.
home.offer_network_desc: Connect with businesses, consultants, and professionals across DE & DK.
home.offer_events_desc: Cross-border forums, workshops, and networking breakfasts near you.
home.focus_sub: Our work is structured around six pillars that drive cross-border collaboration and growth.

focus.data_desc: Mapping regional opportunities and needs through research and analysis.
focus.network_desc: Establishing cross-border business networks connecting professionals.
focus.visibility_desc: Sharing knowledge and stories through our media channels.
focus.talent_desc: Attracting and retaining regional talent across the border.
focus.development_desc: Facilitating cross-border economic advancement and innovation.

home.video_sub: Insights from business leaders and experts on cross-border cooperation.
home.news_sub: Receive updates on events, opportunities, and news from the DE–DK business region.

join.b1: Access to the member network database
join.b5: Access to research and market insights
join.quote: Business DE-DK has opened doors we didn't know existed — direct connections with German partners who share our vision.
join.success_text: We will be in touch shortly.

about.label: About
about.title: Expand Your Business Across the Border
about.intro: Are you looking for the right business partners in the Danish-German border region? Business-region helps companies find new business opportunities, build networks and create growth. Experience the benefits of stronger business collaboration – contact us today.
about.mission_text: Are you looking for the right partners in the Danish-German border region? Business DE-DK helps companies find new business opportunities, build networks and create growth — across the border.
about.mission_text2: We strengthen business collaboration in the border region. We help companies find the right partners, gain access to relevant business information and create growth opportunities on both sides of the border.
about.vision_text: A thriving, integrated cross-border economy where businesses, talent, and innovation flow freely across the Germany–Denmark border.
about.funding_text: Business DE-DK is co-funded by the European Regional Development Fund through the Interreg Deutschland-Danmark programme.

advisors.label: Advisors
advisors.title: Advisory Board
advisors.intro: Experienced professionals guiding Business DE-DK's strategic direction.

bios.petersen: Former Director of Business Development with 20 years of experience in cross-border regional policy.
bios.brandt: CEO of the Schleswig-Holstein Chamber of Commerce with expertise in international trade.
bios.christoffersen: Professor of Regional Economics, specialising in cross-border labour markets.
bios.mueller: Investment promotion specialist who has supported over 50 international companies.
bios.thomsen: Economic development expert with a focus on SME internationalisation.
bios.andersen: Port director and logistics expert facilitating trade flows between Denmark and Germany.
